from pathlib import Path
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd()))
from governance.runners.managed_channel_consumer import validate_message
from governance.runners.contour_lifecycle_runner import advance
from governance.runners.provider_failover import failover_for_contour


def run():
    results = []
    msg = json.loads(Path("governance/tests/fixtures/managed_channel_message_negative_secret.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    ok, errors = validate_message(msg)
    results.append({"test":"managed_channel_reject_secret","ok": ok is False and bool(errors), "errors": errors})
    state = json.loads(Path("governance/tests/fixtures/contour_lifecycle_state_queued.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    bad = advance(state, "completed", proof="premature")
    results.append({"test":"lifecycle_reject_invalid_transition","ok": bad.get("ok") is False, "result": bad})
    fallback = failover_for_contour("C1", "production")
    results.append({"test":"provider_reject_mock_fallback_in_production","ok": fallback.get("ok") is False, "result": fallback})
    return {"ok": all(item["ok"] for item in results), "release_pass": False, "results": results}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    result = run()
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
